---
title: "Flex Dashboard"
runtime: shiny
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)

Ames <- read.csv("~/R/SDS264/InClass_SDS264/AmesHousing.csv")

```

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Chart A

```{r, echo = FALSE}
inputPanel(
  sliderInput(inputId = "year_slider",
              label = "Year",
              min = 1872, 
              max = 2010,
              value = 1960,
              step = 1))

renderPlot(
  ggplot(Ames, aes(x = input$year_slider, y = Overall.Qual)) +
    geom_jitter()
)
```

Column {data-width=350}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Chart B

```{r}

```

### Chart C

```{r}

```
